name: Special Orders - Special Orders Report
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Special Orders report is designed as a single location for getting a full status overview of Special Orders throughout the supply chain - from Supplier to Customer. Each item is displayed, along with details of the linked Purchase Orders and Transfers when applicable."}, {"text": ""}, {"text": ""}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi56EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi56EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-10T010315.370.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the Special Orders Report:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Inventory > Special Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You can also access the report via Quick Links > Special Orders"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"text": "Filters", "bold": true}, {"text": " to refine your search (see below for more details)"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The Fulfilment status is set to "Not Fulfilled" by default so that only open Special Orders are displayed in the results"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The results will be displayed"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Filters"}], "data-id": "filters"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "While most of the filters are self-explanatory, you can see the detailed information below for more advanced filtering explanations:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Order Number"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Customer Order Number"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Entering a Customer Order Number will ignore all other search options and return the Special Order items for that order only."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Order Item Due From/To"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The ETA Date in the Customer Order"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "PO Number"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Purchase Order Number. "}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Entering a Purchase Order Number will ignore all other search options except for the Customer Order Number."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customer "}]}]}, {"type": "td", loyalty cards and membership programs)"}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Fulfil Outlet "}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Outlet from where stock is being dispatched to the customer"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Fulfilment Status"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Whether the stock has been provided to the customer or not"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-e002785e"}, sorted by the customer Order Number, with older orders appearing first."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Click on a column heading to re-sort the results"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi5BEAQ.jpg", 2023-07-10T010322.614.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Results are columns are in order of the progression of a Special Order, from the initial ordering, Transfer if applicable (blank cells means there was no Transfer for that item), and the Customer Order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Purchase Order number, ITO number (Internal Transfer Order) and the Order number (Customer Order) fields are shortcuts that can be clicked to open up the transaction for viewing/editing e.g. clicking the Order # will open the sale in POS."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The columns are as follows:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "PO #"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Order Number. "}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Click the link to open the Purchase Order in a new tab."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create Date"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The date the Purchase Order was created"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "ETA Date"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "PO Outlet"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Source Outlet for the customer Order i.e. the Outlet where the stock from the Purchase Order will be delivered "}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product Description"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The details of the Special Order items, including"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Short Description"}]}]}, {"type": "li", Brand)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ord"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Purchase Order quantity"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Rcv"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The quantity received on the Purchase Order"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "ITO #"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Internal Transfer Order number; the ID of the Transfer linked to the Purchase Order and the Customer Order (if there is no transfer these fields will be blank)."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Click the link to open the Transfer in a new tab"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, the Transfer; the Purchase Order Outlet and Customer Order Source Outlet. s"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Outlet To"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Destination Outlet for the Transfer, and the Customer Order Fulfilment Outlet."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Alloc"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The quantity allocated to the Transfer"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pick"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The quantity picked for the Transfer"}]}]}]}, Invoice/Customer Order #"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Click the link to open the order in POS"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customer Details"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Customer Name, Phone Number and Mobile Number listed on the invoice"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Fulfil Outlet"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Outlet where the order will be fulfilled to the customer"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Due Date"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Due Date for an order item if one was added against the sale in POS"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Cust Cont"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Displays Yes/No to indicate whether the customer has been contacted about the order item (this can be set in POS or in bulk using the Fulfilment Report)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ord"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The quantity ordered by the customer"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "All"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The quantity allocated to date on the Customer Order"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Fill"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The quantity already fulfilled to date on the Customer Order"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Bal"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Quantity remaining to be fulfilled on the Customer Order"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-2e975655"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information?
